Home.title: Connect brands and influencers on a foundation built to scale.
Home.description: Initial frontend with internationalization, persistent themes, and shadcn/ui components ready for product work.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.description: Enter to manage campaigns, creators, and AI-assisted recommendations.
Login.helper: Don't have an account? Contact your administrator.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Initial overview for connecting brands with influencers through AI.

Dashboard.workspaceDescription: Campaign, creator, and AI recommendation modules will live here.
Dashboard.welcome: Your workspace is ready to grow by modules.
Dashboard.adminDescription: Section visible to administrators only: user management, permissions, and advanced settings.
Dashboard.adminPlaceholder: Global metrics and admin quick actions will appear here.
